sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113132" key="xalkokrodustai/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκο-κροδυσταί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, a mystic name for the <sense id="n113132.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Nurses of Dionysus,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.672b</biblScope> </bibl> (dub. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
